name: Yogi Bear's Jellystone Park Camp-Resort: Natural Bridge
summary_text: A lively, family-focused RV resort on the James River near Natural Bridge, with full-hookup sites, cabins, a pool, sandy swimming beach, water attractions, mini-golf, fishing, and a packed schedule of themed activities.
address: 16 Recreation Lane, Natural Bridge Station, VA 24579

amenities.campStore: Ranger Station with Groceries, Camping Supplies and Souvenirs
amenities.swimmingBeach: Sandy Beach on the Swimming Lake

siteFeatures.level: Generally level, with a mix of gravel and concrete-pad sites
otherNotes: Back-in, pull-through, buddy and waterfront RV sites are available.
Full-hookup and water-and-electric sites are offered.
Some premium sites are located along the James River.
Site conditions and shade vary considerably across the large resort.
Review the park map and individual site details before booking a large RV.

activities.waterfront: James River, Fishing Lake and Swimming Lake
activities.boatingLaunch: River Access for Canoeing, Kayaking and Tubing
activities.fishing: Fishing Lake, Elk Creek and James River
activities.hiking: Nearby Trails and National Forest Access

food: Local Restaurants in Lexington and Natural Bridge
